The '''Thyferran Aerospace Defense Force''' was formed from the [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]] in the aftermath of the [[Bacta War]] to guard [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. It was commanded by former [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] pilot [[Bror Jace]] and trained by the Rogues.

==Appearances==
